data.name: Elf World Adventure
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:




Elf World Adventure is an exciting hentai game in the anime and puzzle genre, offering numerous levels where you must assemble images of enchanting elf girls. Immerse yourself in a magical world with a splendid atmosphere, accompanied by relaxing and melodic music. The game will delight you not only with a variety of challenging and captivating puzzles but also with many beautiful achievements that you can use to decorate your profile, showcasing your successes in the world of elves.

BEAUTIFUL ACHIEVEMENTS


FEATURES:




  • Hentai Experience: Engage in a game that blends puzzle-solving with hentai elements.
  • Chill Atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a magical world with beautiful, soothing music.
  • Casual Gameplay: Simple controls and an accessible interface make the game enjoyable for everyone.
  • Beautiful Elf Girls: Discover stunning images of elf girls.
  • Steam Profile Achievements: Decorate your Steam profile with vibrant achievements.
  • Multiple Levels: Enjoy a large number of levels.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
